name: Lemon Ginger Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the flank steak into thin bite-size pieces, cutting across the grain.
2. In a bowl, combine cornstarch, sherry, 1 tablespoon oil, and garlic. Mix well and marinate for 30 minutes.
3. Prepare the Lemon Ginger Sauce; set aside.
4. Heat the remaining tablespoon of oil in a wok or skillet. Stir-fry the meat for 2 to 3 minutes or until cooked through. Remove from pan and set aside.
5. Add carrots and onion to the pan. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
6. Add green beans and cover. Steam for 2 minutes or until tender-crisp.
7. Add mushrooms and stir-fry until the sauce thickens and becomes translucent.
8. Return the meat to the pan and add the Lemon Ginger Sauce. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, until thickened.
9. Serve over cooked rice, if desired. Makes 4 servings.
